name: mostSetCorrectStartupSBC
title: mostSetCorrectStartupSBC
description: During the next start-up phase of the ring, this function activates or deactivates the correct setting of the "Synchronous Bandwidth Control" register (SBC) in the MOST chip (e.g. at the next wake-up of the ring).

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel of the connected MOST interface.
